name: Jillian Montoya
description: Jillian Andrew Montoya is a citizen of the Samaran Federation, born on October 3rd, 2000, in the city of Roblin. She is sweet, sarcastic and makes jokes with her friends. She got interested in mountain climbing from her cousin, Rowan, a very famous climber from the town of Lassoton; and decided she wanted to be a mountain climber. She was living in Roblin for 17 years before going to live in the city of Jasper. She studied various skills during her time in Jasper she studied multiple skills, boxing, linguistics, and learnt many languages, such as Neonican, Surkolian, Rozackian, and Ramroddian for a better look of such languages she studied. She went to the Jasper college to study geology and mountain climbing; eventually graduating with a bachelor’s degree. She works as a mountain climber, reporting any finds to a mountain company. Her friends are Sam(her bestest and closest friend), Sven, Nigel, James, and Marina
creator: Queenofserbia
